justified_non_text_logic: cli.py: display-cell spinner/status height calculation preserves terminal layout for localized CJK text; no command/control flow changes
hermes_cli/skin_engine.py: data-only YAML lookup for terminal command/skin/tip/ui catalogs
gateway/platforms/discord.py: Discord visible labels/descriptions/replies lookup; command names, choice values and custom IDs remain protocol-stable

gateway/platforms/discord.py: Discord proxy resolution passes Discord target hosts into Hermes' existing NO_PROXY logic so permanent profile gateways can bypass broken macOS system proxies; no message routing, command protocol, auth, or model prompt behavior changes

runtime_exceptions.reason: Permanent Discord gateways can silently fail when Hermes auto-detects a dead macOS system proxy. Hermes already supports NO_PROXY, but Discord call sites did not provide target_hosts, so profile-scoped NO_PROXY could not take effect.
runtime_exceptions.shape: Pass a small Discord host tuple into existing resolve_proxy_url() calls.
runtime_exceptions.removal_condition: Remove this overlay exception if upstream Hermes adds equivalent target host handling or a supported per-platform DIRECT/no-proxy configuration knob.

source_policy: minimal display-layer localization hooks for fixed visible terminal and Discord text, plus one declared Discord gateway proxy stability exception; no Web UI, no Telegram platform patch, no model-facing prompt changes
